item.text: I’m going to scan all `Cargo.toml` files (excluding the workspace root) and verify where `orbit-knowledge` appears specifically under `[dependencies]`, `[dev-dependencies]`, or `[build-dependencies]`. Then I’ll map each hit to its crate name and return the exact count.
I found two candidate hits so far (`orbit-cli` and `orbit-tools`). I’m now verifying crate names and exact `Cargo.toml` locations with focused reads before I report.
